name: schooling
short_effect: Wishiwashi becomes Schooling Form when its HP is 25% or higher.
effect_text: If this Pokémon is a wishiwashi and level 20 or above, then when it enters battle and at the start of each turn, it becomes Schooling Form if its HP is 25% or higher and Solo Form otherwise.  This ability cannot be replaced, copied, or nullified.
flavor_text: When it has a lot of HP, the Pokémon forms a powerful school. It stops schooling when its HP is low.
